0000000000100001 0100100011111011 1 -> sum: 0100100100011101, cout: 0

0101101000001101 0100111110100100 0 -> sum: 1010100110110001, cout: 0
0101111010000010 0000110010000010 0 -> sum: 0110101100000100, cout: 0
0000000000000000 0000000000000000 0 -> sum: 0000000000000000, cout: 0

0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
